query:
-- Fix awayModelSpread/homeModelSpread to match modelAwayPuckLine/modelHomePuckLine
-- Fix modelTotal to NULL for games where it's clearly wrong (>8.0 for NHL, puck line is set)
UPDATE games 
SET 
  awayModelSpread = modelAwayPuckLine,
  homeModelSpread = modelHomePuckLine,
  modelTotal = NULL
WHERE sport = 'NHL' 
  AND gameDate = '2026-03-15'
  AND modelAwayPuckLine IS NOT NULL
  AND (CAST(modelTotal AS DECIMAL) > 8.0 OR awayModelSpread != modelAwayPuckLine);

UPDATE games

  homeModelSpread = modelHomePuckLine,
  modelTotal = NULL
